caption: The video appears to be a news segment discussing political developments in Bihar, India. The screen is divided into several sections with text and images of various political figures. On the left side, there are portraits of Samrat Choudhary and Vijay Sinha, labeled as "Deputy CM." In the center, two men are depicted on either side of a balance scale, symbolizing a comparison or competition. The man on the left is labeled as "72 years old, 9th time CM," while the man on the right is labeled as "34 years old, former Deputy CM." The text at the top reads "Congress shaken, Tejashwi's 'picture' remains," indicating a focus on the political dynamics involving Tejashwi Yadav. The bottom text mentions J.P. Nadda's statement about Nitish Kumar's return being good news. The overall theme suggests a discussion on the political landscape and power balance in Bihar.
